ingredients.entityContext: Silk House in Kawasaki shown in episode 1 as part of the local commercial landscape the characters navigate in their day-to-day Kawasaki life.

ingredients.name: Tokyo Station
ingredients.address: 1 Chome Marunouchi, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 100-0005, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Tokyo Station serves as Nijiika's gateway in episode 1 when she arrives from her hometown determined to pursue music in the city, the grand station marking her point of no return.

ingredients.name: Cafe Renoir Shibuya Tokyu Hands-mae

ingredients.address: ２階, 36-2 Udagawacho, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0042, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Cafe Renoir near Shibuya Tokyu Hands features in episode 4 as a spot the characters visit during their time in Tokyo, capturing the kissaten culture embedded in Japanese band life.

ingredients.name: Mikan Shimokita
ingredients.type: ショッピング モール

ingredients.entityContext: Mikan Shimokita complex near Shimokitazawa Station features in episode 10, the trendy redevelopment area near the station that the girls pass through on their Shimokitazawa visit.

ingredients.name: Mizonokuchi Theater

ingredients.entityContext: Mizonokuchi Theater in Kawasaki appears in episode 7 as a local performance venue in the city, part of the network of stages that chart Togenashi Togeari's gradual ascent up the live music ladder.

ingredients.name: Nitori Kawasaki Motogi Store
ingredients.localName: ニトリ 川崎元木店
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-4-1 Motogi, Kawasaki Ward, Kawasaki, Kanagawa 210-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Nitori home furnishings store near Kawasaki features in episode 1, a practical stop for Nijiika as she sets up her new life in Kawasaki, grounding the show's portrait of the realities of moving out alone.

ingredients.name: Starffin Baseball Stadium

ingredients.entityContext: The baseball stadium referenced in episode 13 as a large outdoor venue in the final arc, representing the grandest possible performance scale the characters envision for Togenashi Togeari's future.

ingredients.name: Sakamoto Kyu Memorial

ingredients.entityContext: The Sakamoto Kyu memorial in Kawasaki, honoring the famous singer who was born in the city, appears in episode 1 as a local landmark that underscores Kawasaki's deep music heritage which the anime celebrates.

ingredients.address: Japan, 〒210-0007 Kanagawa, Kawasaki, Kawasaki Ward, Ekimae Honcho, 26
